games.landKingText: Drag the settlements to locate them in the country. The more accurate you are, the more points you will receive. Three minutes at your disposal
games.landKingLocationFeedback1: Precise. This is not your home by chance?$Have you considered a career in navigation?$Bull's Eye$Straight to the point
games.landKingLocationFeedback2: Nice$A little more and we're there$Not bad
games.landKingLocationFeedback3: Not really$Maybe you should use Waze$You can put in more effort$You're not from around, are you?
games.landKingLocationFeedback4: It's better to bring a compass$Not even close

about.text:
So who are we really?
Oded and Yeshurun ​​Bartov. Two brothers who grew up in a family that loves hiking and from a young age walked along the length and depth of beautiful country trails, so over the years we have accumulated a lot of knowledge about hiking and without paying attention we became a kind of call center (well, WhatsApp center) to which people turn for recommendations. Tripper we have combined the knowledge of both of you and you who benefit of course.
The app is still under construction, so feel free to contact us with any questions, comments or just to compliment us.
A huge thank you to everyone who helped and took part -
to the talented Ariel Adler, for the design.
Oren Kraft, Hadar Schweizer Kats, Tzvika Gvirtsman, Matan Feldman, Elad Leibowitz, Neria Brice, Ortal Peretz and Amit Arart for the amazing pictures.
And to those who forgot about what we forgot.

Pay attention! All explanations and information mentioned in this app are for recommendations only. Each traveler does so on their own and we do not take responsibility for any accident or injury caused as a result.
Have a fun trip!
